findings.action: Upsize the section or reduce the axial load until NEd / Nc,Rd <= 1.0 per Eurocode 3, Section 6.2.4.

calc.label: Column compression — Calculation summary — 13 lines
lines: A       = 168   > Steel Blue Book . SCI P363 pp.74-75

findings.issue: Exceeds the column compression limit because NEd = 6,896.25 kN > Nc,Rd = 4,620 kN (1.49 > 1.0).
findings.name: Column compression

findings.action: Upsize the column section to raise the radius of gyration and reduce slenderness, then recheck chi and Nb,Rd per Eurocode 3, Section 6.3.1.

calc.label: Column buckling — Calculation summary — 24 lines
lines: A       = 168   > Steel Blue Book . SCI P363 pp.74-75
iz      = 6.69   > Steel Blue Book . SCI P363 pp.74-75
section_type= UC   > Steel Blue Book . SCI P363 pp.74-75
axis    = minor   > Steel Blue Book . SCI P363 pp.74-75

findings.issue: The document states Nb,Rd = 4,059.17 kN, but the code-correct value is 3,751.5 kN (8.2% discrepancy). The code-correct resistance is still exceeded (NEd / Nb,Rd = 1.84 > 1.0).
findings.name: Column buckling

findings.action: Confirm the steel grade on the section order and take fy from the EN 10025-2 thickness band for the actual flange thickness.
findings.issue: fy taken as 275 N/mm2, but for S275 with tf = 25.3 mm the EN 10025-2 thickness band gives fy = 265 N/mm2. Every resistance computed from 275 is overstated.
findings.name: Steel grade

findings.action: Reapply the ULS combination with gamma_G = 1.35 and gamma_Q = 1.50 per EN 1990, Section A1.3, then carry the corrected axial load through all downstream checks.
findings.issue: No load combinations check is presented — required inputs (Gk, Qk) not found in the document. EN 1990, Section A1.3 requires this check.
findings.name: Load combinations

findings.action: Compute the design shear force and verify VEd / Vpl,Rd <= 1.0 per Eurocode 3, Section 6.2.6.
findings.issue: No column shear check is presented — required input (VEd) not found in the document. Eurocode 3, Section 6.2.6 requires this check.
findings.name: Column shear

findings.action: Calculate the c/t ratios for flange and web and verify the claimed class against Eurocode 3, Section 5.5, Table 5.2 before relying on plastic resistance.
findings.issue: The document asserts Class 1 but no c/t ratio is calculated to confirm it. Eurocode 3, Section 5.5 requires classification before plastic resistance can be used. Engineer judgement required.
findings.name: Cross-section class
